compiled_state.title: Implement nava-platform template install path in onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add the nava-platform CLI install path to `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md`. This handles templates that use copier-based installation (NextJS, Flask, Rails).

### Implementation
After Phase 1.5 selects a nava-platform template, add install steps:
1. Probe for uv then pipx on PATH — if neither found, print actionable install instructions and abort template path (fall back to manual flow)
2. Install nava-platform CLI via uv/pipx from GitHub
3. Verify installation: nava-platform --help exits 0 (smoke test)
4. Run nava-platform app install with --data flags from registry's required_data_flags list (collected in Phase 1.5), properly quoted
5. Timeout on all subprocess calls (default 120s)
6. On any failure: surface clear error message and offer manual flow as fallback
7. Log exact nava-platform commit/version installed

Read the Template Selection Result from scratchpad (populated by Phase 1.5 gate) to get template metadata.

### File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (PROTECTED — user approved)

### TDD Exemption
test-exempt: Unit exemption criterion 1 — skill file is LLM workflow guidance, not executable code

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains nava-platform install path section
  Verify: grep -q "nava-platform.*install\|install.*nava-platform" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Probes for uv/pipx
  Verify: grep -q "uv\|pipx" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Handles failure with fallback
  Verify: grep -qi "fallback\|manual flow" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] References --data flags from registry
  Verify: grep -q "\-\-data\|data.flag\|required_data_flags" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md

comments.body: Fixed: nava-platform install path added to onboarding SKILL.md.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
